Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.cfg

Class UofConfigurationImpl

java.lang.Object
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.cfg.UofConfigurationImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
UofConfiguration
public class UofConfigurationImpl extends Object implements UofConfiguration
This class is used to specify various configuration parameters for a session to the Sportradar system(s)

    • getDefaultLanguage

      public Locale getDefaultLanguage()
      Description copied from interface: UofConfiguration
      The locale used for any getter that returns localized Strings. (i.e. Sport name, Tournament name, Team name, Player name etc). The locale is English if not specified.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultLanguage in interface UofConfiguration
      Returns:
      the locale

    • getNodeId

      public Integer getNodeId()
      Description copied from interface: UofConfiguration
